input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.3.3
            TITLE: operation of the bots to the off position must open the shutdown circuit ic.9.2.2 / ev.7.2.2

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.3.3: Operation of the BOTS to the OFF position must Open the Shutdown Circuit IC.9.2.2 / EV.7.2.2
T.3.3.3 Operation of the BOTS to the OFF position must Open the Shutdown Circuit IC.9.2.2 / EV.7.2.2

final_answer: Operation of the BOTS to the OFF position must Open the Shutdown Circuit IC.9.2.2 / EV.7.2.2
